title: Disticholiparis prava
taxonomy: Disticholiparis prava is a species of plant in the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This classification places it within the larger group of flowering plants known as angiosperms. Within the Orchidaceae family, Disticholiparis prava is further grouped into the subfamily Orchidoideae. The genus Disticholiparis is part of a larger family of orchid genera. Disticholiparis prava is classified as a type of terrestrial orchid.

constituents: Unfortunately, I was unable to find any information on Disticholiparis prava's active constituents.
intro: There is not enough information available about the plant Disticholiparis prava.
